pods.name: Humyn Labs — Audio
pods.note: Multi-pipeline: validation, annotation, collection, account infra & data ops

items.feature: Increase the units limit for ingestion and csv download for off-platform vendors Data beign ingestion inside a project as an open pool - capped at 1K CSV download after the units allocated to the offplatform vendor - capped at 5k  Ingestion of the offplatform vendors annotation back in system - currently capped i assume??
Transcription drift to be flagged in the system
Error Messages to be fixed on Quest UI and Validation system
Assigning data units to annotators - require script to auto upload audios and transcripts to vendors bucket.
New post-processing service for data delivery(cross account/ cross org/ copy of data to client bucket)
Pre-Processing related - Conversion of files in delivery format - Bring Manifest Mapping in the system
Creating Feedback Loop for a self learning tool using the changes made by annotators on the pre-annotation

devsecEpics.name: Endpoint Security Rollout
devsecEpics.desc: Deploy SentinelOne to 120 endpoints, covering pilot and full rollout.

devsecEpics.name: Cloud CNAPP & Workload Protection
devsecEpics.desc: Implement CNAPP solution and deploy agents across 143 cloud workloads.

devsecEpics.name: Splunk Deployment & Log Onboarding
devsecEpics.desc: Procure and deploy Splunk, ensuring prioritized ingestion of security logs.

devsecEpics.name: MDM Deployment & Compliance
devsecEpics.desc: Deploy MDM across corporate devices to enforce security and compliance policies.

devsecEpics.name: Build Security Operations Team
devsecEpics.desc: Hire and onboard essential security roles to establish the Security Operations Team.

devsecEpics.name: Splunk Procurement
devsecEpics.desc: Complete all commercial, financial, and legal procurement steps for Splunk licensing.

devsecEpics.name: MDM Procurement & Licensing
devsecEpics.desc: Finalize vendor selection and complete the procurement cycle for MDM solution licensing.

devsecEpics.name: Procurement Governance & Vendor Mgmt
devsecEpics.desc: Establish structured governance and management for all security tool procurements.

devsecEpics.name: Cloudflare WAF Deployment
devsecEpics.desc: Implement and tune Cloudflare WAF to protect critical humynlabs kgen kratos exlr8 domains.

devsecEpics.name: Reduce Public Application Exposure
devsecEpics.desc: Reduce the external attack surface by removing non-critical applications from public exposure.

devsecEpics.name: Multi-Cloud Threat Investigation
devsecEpics.desc: Perform deep threat investigations and analyze anomalies across AWS, GCP, and Cloudflare.

devsecEpics.name: Kubernetes Security Posture Review
devsecEpics.desc: Conduct a comprehensive security posture review for existing GKE and new AWS Kubernetes clusters.

devsecEpics.name: Post-Migration EKS Security Review
devsecEpics.desc: Validate and harden the security posture of the new AWS EKS cluster following migration.

devsecEpics.name: Kubernetes Cluster Segregation Design
devsecEpics.desc: Design an architecture to segregate workloads into multiple Kubernetes clusters, reducing blast radius.
